endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.CustomerInsights/hubs/{hubName}/views/{viewName}
endpoints.description: Gets a view in the hub.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HUBNAME}} with a real hubname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VIEWNAME}} with a real viewname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.CustomerInsights/hubs/{hubName}/views/{viewName}
endpoints.description: Creates a view or updates an existing view in the hub.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HUBNAME}} with a real hubname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VIEWNAME}} with a real viewname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.CustomerInsights/hubs/{hubName}/views/{viewName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a view in the specified hub.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HUBNAME}} with a real hubname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{VIEWNAME}} with a real viewname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.CustomerInsights/hubs/{hubName}/widgetTypes
endpoints.description: Gets all available widget types in the specified hub.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{HUBNAME}} with a real hubname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.CustomerInsights/hubs/{hubName}/widgetTypes/{widgetTypeName}
endpoints.description: Gets a widget type in the specified hub.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{WIDGETTYPENAME}} with a real widgettypename. Replace {{HUBNAME}} with a real hubname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
